summary: The diff implements comprehensive code changes for Stripe payment integration, including frontend routing, checkout session creation, success/failure pages, and backend payment logic. However, the actual deployment error diagnosis and resolution (REQ-1) is not evident in the diff. The diff shows feature implementation rather than deployment fixes.

missing_requirements.requirement: Diagnose and resolve the deployment error that is preventing Version 6 from being deployed to production successfully
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence of deployment configuration changes, error diagnosis logs, infrastructure fixes, or deployment script modifications. The diff only shows application code changes (Stripe integration features) without addressing deployment blockers.
No deployment configuration files, CI/CD pipeline changes, or deployment infrastructure modifications are present in the diff to address deployment completion issues.
No changes to deployment scripts, canister configurations, or production environment setup that would enable successful deployment.

hallucinated_features.description: Payment success and failure callback pages implementation
hallucinated_features.reason: While REQ-2 mentions verifying payment callbacks work correctly, it does not request implementing new success/failure pages. These pages appear to be new feature implementations rather than fixes to existing functionality.

hallucinated_features.description: PaymentSetup admin component with Stripe configuration UI
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest focuses on fixing deployment errors and verifying existing Stripe integration works in production. Adding a new admin setup interface for Stripe configuration is a new feature, not a deployment fix.

hallucinated_features.description: Enhanced checkout session validation with double-checking session.url
hallucinated_features.reason: While improving validation logic, this appears to be a new feature enhancement rather than fixing a specific deployment error. No deployment-related error mentions missing session URL validation.
